name: Heavenly Sword and Dragon Slaying Sabre
overview: Near the end of the Yuan Dynasty, different camps of fighters wreak havoc in the realm of combat. There are rumors that the possessor of Dragon Slaying Saber and Heavenly Sword can become the invincible fighter
